title: generations registry
description: Lineage stages of the apparatus. Orthogonal to configuration (physical state); the two must not be conflated (invariant 6).

supersedes.description: Key of the generation this one follows (lineage order).

period.description: Approximate calendar period this generation was active (free text, e.g. '2019-2023').

changes.description: What changed in the apparatus at this lineage stage.
